message:
feat(fwc): add batch progress tracking module (bead qnchs.7.3)

Batch/map progress tracking with ETA estimation, throughput calculation,
partial result persistence, and resume planning. Includes progress bar
rendering and JSON sidecar for interruption recovery. Also fixes clippy
in pipe.rs (too_many_lines, map_unwrap_or) and main.rs (raw string hashes).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -7135,7 +7135,7 @@ default = "#general"
         let path = root.join("notify.toml");
         std::fs::write(
             &path,
-            r##"
+            r#"
 [pipeline]
 name = "notify-on-new-issues"
 
@@ -7148,7 +7148,7 @@ id = "notify"
 operation = "slack.send_message"
 depends_on = ["fetch"]
 condition = "{{steps.fetch.output.issues | length}} > 0"
-"##,
+"#,
         )
         .unwrap();
